# SENAVIA Corp

> Digital agency in Plantation, Florida. Custom web design, web development, and traffic generation (SEO, SEM & GEO) for South Florida businesses across Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties. Bilingual site (English / Spanish); blog articles are published in English.

Legal name: Senavia Corp
Website: https://senaviacorp.com

## Services

- [Custom Web Design](https://senaviacorp.com/services/web-design): Conversion-focused custom sites, CMS & e-commerce built to capture your brand.
- [Traffic Generation](https://senaviacorp.com/services/traffic-generation): SEO, SEM & GEO working together to capture organic, paid, and AI-driven traffic.
- [Web Development](https://senaviacorp.com/services/web-development): Admin panels, CRM/ERP portals & workflow automation for how your team works.
- [All Services](https://senaviacorp.com/services): Overview of every service line.

## Subservices

### Custom Web Design
- [Business Website Design](https://senaviacorp.com/services/web-design/business-website-design): Conversion-focused custom business sites built on local SEO.
- [Corporate Website Design](https://senaviacorp.com/services/web-design/corporate-website-design): Premium multi-page corporate platforms built to scale.
- [Shopify Store Design](https://senaviacorp.com/services/web-design/shopify-store-design): High-converting Shopify stores built to sell from day one.
- [Custom Website Development](https://senaviacorp.com/services/web-design/custom-website-development): Custom functionality, integrations, portals & dashboards.
- [Landing Page Design](https://senaviacorp.com/services/web-design/landing-page-design): High-intent landing pages for Google Ads that lower cost per lead.
- [Website Redesign](https://senaviacorp.com/services/web-design/website-redesign): Rebuilds for modern UX, speed & SEO without losing rankings.

### Traffic Generation
- [Google Ads Management](https://senaviacorp.com/services/traffic-generation/google-ads-management): Managed Google Ads search campaigns tuned for lower CPA and higher ROAS.
- [SEO Services](https://senaviacorp.com/services/traffic-generation/seo-services): Technical, on-page & content SEO for durable organic traffic.
- [Local SEO Services](https://senaviacorp.com/services/traffic-generation/local-seo-services): Local SEO & map-pack visibility across Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach.
- [Facebook & Instagram Ads](https://senaviacorp.com/services/traffic-generation/facebook-instagram-ads): Meta ad funnels (Facebook & Instagram) that drive qualified leads.
- [Google Business Profile Optimization](https://senaviacorp.com/services/traffic-generation/google-business-profile-optimization): Google Business Profile & Maps optimization to win the local pack.
- [AI Search Optimization (GEO)](https://senaviacorp.com/services/traffic-generation/ai-search-optimization): GEO/AEO to get cited in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews.

### Web Development
- [Custom Web Application Development](https://senaviacorp.com/services/web-development/custom-web-application-development): Bespoke web apps, portals & SaaS built around your business logic.
- [Admin Panel Development](https://senaviacorp.com/services/web-development/admin-panel-development): Custom dashboards & admin panels for real-time KPIs and operations.
- [CRM Development](https://senaviacorp.com/services/web-development/crm-development): Custom CRMs — pipelines, client portals & follow-up automation.
- [API Integration Services](https://senaviacorp.com/services/web-development/api-integration-services): API & webhook integrations connecting CRM, ERP, payments & tools.
- [Workflow Automation](https://senaviacorp.com/services/web-development/workflow-automation): Automated workflows that eliminate manual busywork.
- [ERP System Development](https://senaviacorp.com/services/web-development/erp-system-development): Modular ERP unifying finance, inventory & operations.

- [Prices & Packages](https://senaviacorp.com/pricing): Transparent pricing for every business size.

- [Video Testimonials](https://senaviacorp.com/testimonials): Client results in their own words.
- [About Us](https://senaviacorp.com/about): Who we are and how we work.
- [Blog & Tips](https://senaviacorp.com/blog): Articles on web design, SEO, digital marketing, and automation (English).
- [Service Areas](https://senaviacorp.com/service-areas): City-by-city coverage across South Florida.
- [Contact](https://senaviacorp.com/contact): Contact form and business details.

## Service Area

- Miami-Dade County, FL
- Broward County, FL
- Palm Beach County, FL
